info.description: OAuth service providing third-party login, authorization codes, token management, etc.
info.title: OAuth Service API

get.description: Returns a paginated list of OAuth clients in the current tenant, filterable by name and status.

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

post.description: Creates a new OAuth client and returns credentials (client_secret returned once). Supports configuring redirect_uris, scopes, grant_types, JWKS, FAPI profile, etc.

parameters.description: Create client request (includes name, redirect_uris, scopes, grant_types, etc.)
parameters.name: request

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

get.description: Retrieves full details of a specific client by client_id.

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

put.description: Updates configuration of a specified OAuth client (redirect_uris, scopes, grant_types, name, status, JWKS, etc.).

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

delete.description: Soft-deletes a specified OAuth client and its associated tokens.

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

404.description: Client not found or does not belong to the current tenant

get.description: Returns audit logs for a specified client (operator, operation time, operation type, change details, etc.).

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

404.description: Client not found or does not belong to the current tenant

post.description: Clones a specified client and returns new credentials (client_secret returned once). Retains the original client's redirect_uris, scopes, grant_types, JWKS, etc.

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

404.description: Client not found or does not belong to the current tenant

post.description: Generates a new secret for a specified client; the old secret is immediately invalidated (moved to history table, still verifiable for 4 hours).

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

404.description: Client not found or does not belong to the current tenant

get.description: Returns metadata for all secrets of a specified client (without secret values).
get.summary: List All Secrets for OAuth Client

200.description: Secret list (includes secret_id, status, created_at, last_used_at, etc.)

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

404.description: Client not found or does not belong to the current tenant

post.description: Creates a new secret for a specified client (secret_value returned once). Supports up to 2 active secrets.

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

404.description: Client not found or does not belong to the current tenant

409.description: Conflict: maximum number of secrets reached (max 2)

delete.description: Hard-deletes a specified secret (at least one secret must remain).

400.description: Invalid request parameters: cannot delete the last secret

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

put.description: Sets a specified secret's status to inactive (existing tokens still verifiable, but new tokens not accepted).

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

get.description: Returns token usage statistics for a specified client (active token count, last request time, etc.).

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

404.description: Client not found or does not belong to the current tenant

get.description: Returns a list of active access tokens and refresh tokens for a specified client.
get.summary: List Active Tokens for OAuth Client

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

404.description: Client not found or does not belong to the current tenant

delete.description: Revokes all active tokens for a specified client, with an optional grace period (in seconds).
delete.summary: Revoke All Tokens for OAuth Client

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

404.description: Client not found or does not belong to the current tenant

get.description: Paginated list of all device authorization code sessions in the current tenant, filterable by status and client ID. Admin only.

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

delete.description: Revokes a specified device authorization session, marking it as expired. Admin only.

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

get.description: Retrieves a list of all OAuth providers in the current tenant, including name, ID, enabled status, etc. Admin only.

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

post.description: Creates a new OAuth provider configuration, including name, Client ID, Client Secret, authorization/token/userinfo endpoint URLs, etc. Admin only.

parameters.description: Create provider request (includes name, display_name, client_id, client_secret, redirect_url, auth_url, token_url, userinfo_url, etc.)
parameters.name: body

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

put.description: Updates configuration of a specified OAuth provider, supports partial update (only submit fields to modify). Admin only.

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

delete.description: Deletes a specified OAuth provider configuration. Admin only.

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

put.description: Enables or disables a specified OAuth provider. Admin only.

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

delete.description: Batch revokes all access tokens and refresh tokens for a specified user. JWT authentication required, admin only.

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

post.description: Internal API, called by tenant-service when creating a new tenant, to register a default OAuth client for the tenant. Protected by InternalAPIKeyAuth + ExtractTenantFromHeaderStrict.

401.description: No valid X-API-Key provided

post.description: Internal token introspection endpoint, no JWT authentication, only for inter-service calls. Uses system standard envelope dto_base.DataResponse[T]. Differs from standard Introspect endpoint: accepts only JSON body (not form-encoded), response uses system standard envelope instead of OAuth flat format, not exposed to external OAuth clients.

200.description: Introspection result (includes active, client_id, user_id, scope, exp)

post.description: Internal API endpoint, called by identity-service to cascade revoke OAuth tokens, hard-delete OAuth connections and authorization consents on password change/account lockout/GDPR erasure. Protected by InternalAPIKeyAuth + ExtractTenantFromHeaderStrict middleware.
post.summary: Internal Revoke User Tokens (GDPR erasure cascade)

get.description: OAuth 2.0 authorization endpoint. Returns 302 redirect when redirect_uri is provided; returns JSON authorization code otherwise. Supports PKCE and PAR (via request_uri). References: RFC 6749 §4.1.1-4.1.2.1 (Authorization Code Grant), RFC 7636 (PKCE), RFC 9126 (PAR), OAuth 2.1 optional iss parameter.

302.description: Redirect to callback URL with OAuth error (invalid_request/invalid_client/unsupported_response_type)

400.description: invalid_request_uri: PAR request invalid/expired/already used. Reference: RFC 9126.

500.description: server_error: authorization server internal error. Reference: RFC 6749 §5.2.

post.description: OAuth 2.0 authorization endpoint (POST method). After user confirms authorization, returns 302 redirect when redirect_uri is provided; returns JSON authorization code otherwise. Supports PKCE, PAR, and automatic consent saving. References: RFC 6749 §4.1.1-4.1.2.1 (Authorization Code Grant), RFC 7636 (PKCE), RFC 9126 (PAR).

parameters.description: Authorization request body (includes response_type, client_id, redirect_uri, scope, state, user_id, approved, etc.)
parameters.name: body

302.description: Redirect to callback URL with OAuth error (invalid_request/invalid_client/access_denied)

400.description: invalid_request_uri: PAR request invalid/expired/already used. Reference: RFC 9126.

403.description: access_denied: user_id does not match authenticated user

500.description: server_error: authorization server internal error. Reference: RFC 6749 §5.2.

post.description: Binds the current user's AuthMS account to a third-party OAuth provider account. Requires JWT authentication; user_id in request body must match JWT subject.

401.description: Unauthenticated

get.description: Returns non-sensitive public information (name, logo, scopes, tenant ID) for a client by client_id. Used for consent authorization page display.
Returns all third-party OAuth connections for a specified user. Requires JWT authentication; user_id in path must match JWT subject.

401.description: Unauthenticated

403.description: No permission to access this user's connections

get.description: Retrieves all authorized OAuth client consent records for the current user, including client ID, authorized scopes, and authorization time.

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

delete.description: Revokes an authorization consent record for a specific OAuth client for the current user. After revocation, the client's access tokens become invalid.

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

post.description: OAuth 2.0 device authorization endpoint. Device initiates authorization request, obtains device_code and user_code; user then enters user_code in browser to complete authorization. Public endpoint, no authentication required. Reference: RFC 8628 §3.1 (Device Authorization Grant).

parameters.description: Device authorization request (includes client_id, scope, etc.)
parameters.name: body

200.description: Device authorization response (includes device_code, user_code, verification_uri, expires_in, interval)

400.description: invalid_client: client not found or not active. Reference: RFC 8628 §3.1.

500.description: server_error: failed to create device authorization. Reference: RFC 8628 §3.1.

post.description: User enters user_code in browser and approves/denies device authorization. Requires JWT authentication. Reference: RFC 8628 §3.3 (User Interaction).

200.description: Authorization result (device authorized or device authorization denied)

400.description: Invalid request parameters: user_code invalid/expired/already processed

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

500.description: Internal server error: failed to update device authorization status

get.description: DPoP (Demonstration of Proof-of-Possession) Nonce endpoint. Clients call this before initiating a DPoP-bound request; returns nonce via DPoP-Nonce response header.

post.description: OAuth 2.0 token introspection endpoint. Checks token active status, returns token metadata (sub, client_id, scope, exp, etc.). Returns flat JSON (no code/message envelope). Reference: RFC 7662 (Token Introspection).

200.description: Introspection result (active=true includes full token metadata; active=false returns only active field)

400.description: invalid_request: missing token parameter. Reference: RFC 7662 §2.1.

get.description: Returns a list of all enabled OAuth providers in the current tenant.

post.description: OAuth 2.0 Pushed Authorization Request endpoint (PAR). Client pushes authorization parameters to authorization server in advance, obtains request_uri to use in authorization request. Returns flat JSON (no code/message envelope). Reference: RFC 9126 (Pushed Authorization Requests).

parameters.description: PAR request body (includes client_id, response_type, scope, state, redirect_uri, client_secret, etc.)
parameters.name: body

400.description: invalid_request: request parameters missing or invalid. Reference: RFC 9126.

401.description: invalid_client: client authentication failed. Reference: RFC 9126.

500.description: server_error: failed to store authorization request. Reference: RFC 9126.

post.description: OAuth 2.0 refresh token endpoint. Uses refresh_token to obtain a new access_token and refresh_token (rotation). Returns flat JSON (no code/message envelope). Reference: RFC 6749 §6 (Refreshing an Access Token).

200.description: Refreshed tokens (includes new access_token and refresh_token)

400.description: invalid_request: request parameters missing or invalid. Reference: RFC 6749 §5.2.

401.description: invalid_grant: refresh_token invalid or expired. Reference: RFC 6749 §5.2.

post.description: OAuth 2.0 dynamic client registration endpoint. Clients self-register and obtain client_id, client_secret, and registration_access_token. Rate limit: max 10 registrations per hour per IP. Reference: RFC 7591 §2 (Dynamic Client Registration Protocol).

parameters.description: Client registration request (includes client_name, redirect_uris, grant_types, scope, etc.)
parameters.name: body

201.description: Registration successful (includes client_id, client_secret, registration_access_token). Reference: RFC 7591 §2.1.

400.description: invalid_client_metadata: request metadata invalid (missing redirect_uris, etc.). Reference: RFC 7591 §2.3.

429.description: rate_limit_exceeded: registration rate limit exceeded, please retry later

get.description: OAuth 2.0 dynamic client registration read endpoint. Uses Registration Access Token to read current client metadata. Reference: RFC 7591 §3 (Client Read Request).

401.description: invalid_token: missing or invalid Registration Access Token. Reference: RFC 7591 §3.2.

put.description: OAuth 2.0 dynamic client registration update endpoint. Uses Registration Access Token to update client metadata (redirect_uris, grant_types, scope, JWKS, etc.). Reference: RFC 7591 §2.2 (Client Update Request).

401.description: invalid_token: missing or invalid Registration Access Token. Reference: RFC 7591 §2.3.

500.description: server_error: failed to update client registration

delete.description: OAuth 2.0 dynamic client registration delete endpoint. Uses Registration Access Token to soft-delete client registration. Reference: RFC 7591 §2.3 (Client Delete Request).

401.description: invalid_token: missing or invalid Registration Access Token. Reference: RFC 7591 §2.3.

500.description: server_error: failed to delete client registration

post.description: OAuth 2.0 token revocation endpoint. Returns 200 OK on success (no response body). Supports revocation of access_token and refresh_token. Reference: RFC 7009 (Token Revocation).

400.description: invalid_request: request parameters missing or invalid. Reference: RFC 7009 §2.2.

get.description: Queries risk assessment logs for an OAuth client by client_id, returning risk score, risk level, and recommended actions.

200.description: Risk assessment result (includes risk_score, risk_level, recommended_actions)

401.description: Unauthenticated: provide a valid Bearer Token

post.description: OAuth 2.0 token endpoint. Supports authorization_code, refresh_token, client_credentials, and urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:device_code grant types. Supports private_key_jwt client authentication and DPoP. Returns flat JSON (no code/message envelope). References: RFC 6749 §4.1.3 (Authorization Code Grant), §4.3 (Resource Owner Password), §4.4 (Client Credentials), RFC 6749 §5.1-5.2, RFC 7636 (PKCE), RFC 8628 §3.4 (Device Code).

parameters.description: PKCE Code Verifier (required for public client)
parameters.name: code_verifier

200.description: Token response (contains access_token, refresh_token, id_token, etc.)

400.description: unsupported_grant_type: Unsupported grant type. See RFC 6749 §5.2.

401.description: invalid_client: Client authentication failed. See RFC 6749 §5.2.

429.description: rate_limit_exceeded: Request rate too high, please retry later

500.description: server_error: Internal error in authorization server. See RFC 6749 §5.2.

post.description: Implements RFC 8693 token exchange standard, supporting delegation chains with subject_token and actor_token, exchanging original JWT for a restricted access token for downstream services. Used for NHI Workload identity delegation scenarios. See RFC 8693 (OAuth 2.0 Token Exchange).

200.description: Exchanged access token (contains access_token, token_type, expires_in, scope)

400.description: invalid_scope: Requested scope is invalid or out of range. See RFC 8693.

401.description: invalid_token: subject_token is invalid or expired

500.description: server_error: Internal error in token exchange service

delete.description: Delete the specified OAuth connection, unbinding the AuthMS user from the third-party OAuth provider. Requires JWT authentication.

401.description: Unauthenticated

get.description: OpenID Connect UserInfo endpoint. Uses Bearer Token authentication, returns flat UserInfo JSON (no code/message envelope). When scope includes "profile", queries user profile from profile-service and merges into response. When verification-service is configured, additionally queries age group/minor status. See OpenID Connect Core 1.0 §5.3 (UserInfo Endpoint).

200.description: UserInfo response (contains OIDC standard claims such as sub, name, email, picture)

401.description: invalid_token: Token is invalid or expired. See OIDC Core §5.3.

get.description: Generate a third-party OAuth authorization redirect URL based on the provider name. The state parameter is optional; if not provided, it will be auto-generated and signed.
Callback endpoint after third-party OAuth provider authorization. Exchanges the authorization code for an access token and fetches user info.

parameters.description: Authorization code returned by third party
parameters.name: code

200.description: Callback processing result (contains masked token and user info)

500.description: Failed to exchange authorization code or fetch user info

client_secret_expires_at.description: Client secret expiration time (0 = never expires)

dto.ClientRegistrationUpdateRequest.description: OAuth 2.0 Dynamic Client Registration update request (RFC 7591 §2.2)

dto.CloneClientResponse.description: Result of cloning a client, contains the new client's secret (returned only once)

dto.CreateClientSecretResponse.description: OAuth client secret creation result, secret_value is returned only once in this response

dto.OAuthClientSecretResponse.description: OAuth client secret info, without actual secret value

dto.OAuthTokenItem.description: OAuth token info, without token text

name.description: OIDC Standard Claims (optional, filled when scope=profile)

dto.RevokeClientTokensResponse.description: Result of revoking all tokens for a client

has_next.description: HasNext indicates whether there is a next page

has_prev.description: HasPrev indicates whether there is a previous page

page.description: Page is the current page number (1-based)

page_size.description: PageSize is the number of items per page

total.description: Total is the total number of items across all pages

total_pages.description: TotalPages is the total number of pages

bearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
bearerAuth.name: Authorization

tags.description: OAuth 2.0 / OIDC standard interfaces: authorization code, token, introspection, revocation
tags.name: OAuth

tags.description: OAuth client registration, configuration, secret rotation
tags.name: OAuth Client Management

tags.description: OpenID Connect related interfaces: discovery, user info, session management
tags.name: OIDC
